faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my Lake Success property and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and professional-grade equipment designed specifically for safe wasp elimination. Our licensed technicians follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and landscaping. faqs.question: Do you handle wasps in hard-to-reach areas like high eaves or trees?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We're equipped with extension poles, ladders, and specialized equipment to safely reach wasp nests in high eaves, tall trees, attics, and wall voids common in Lake Success homes. Our technicians are trained in safe elevation work and can access nests up to 30 feet high while ensuring complete removal.
